title: Bonapart
description: A Man and Women of Unknown Nature Comes Into Your World And Roams Around
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3562296679da84a701734b6b443b98fcdf2d99.webp)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00258a1853277970c91a5189fa6ce14eda94ab41.webp)
Bonapart Adds A New Neutral Mob Whos Named Bonapart (Bone·uh·part), Napoleon Bonaparte does not inspire the Name, Bonapart Is A Made Name By a Friend And I Stuck With It

 

Bonapart Is A Neutral Little Guy Who Wonders The World And Will Fight Back With Anyone OR Anything That Hurts Him 

Bonapart Doesn't Do Much But He Could Be Your Friend

 

Bonapart Doesn't Do Much But Exist In Your World And He's Also Immued To Dragons Breath, Why? Well Bonapart Is Him, He Just Is
